items.title: MN lawmaker takes action to get answers on Omar's alleged fraud ties after she skips key hearing: 'Ghosted us'
items.description: Rep. Ilhan Omar faces scrutiny after skipping a Minnesota hearing on her potential links to the massive Feeding Our Future pandemic fraud probe.

items.title: Parents push Congress to act on kids' online safety after juries find Meta and YouTube liable for harm
items.description: Roughly 70 parents traveled to the U.S. Capitol to push for online safety legislation after juries found Meta and YouTube liable for harming children.

items.title: Xavier Becerra pressed on 'rumors' he knew about Eric Swalwell's alleged misconduct during CA governor debate
items.description: Xavier Becerra was pressed on his knowledge of Eric Swalwell's sexual misconduct rumors during a California gubernatorial debate Wednesday.

items.title: Trump admin loosens regulations on state-licensed medical marijuana
items.description: President Donald Trump's administration loosened federal regulations on state-licensed marijuana on Thursday.

items.title: Key House committee schedules hearing with embattled ActBlue CEO: 'Needs to come clean'
items.description: The House Administration is scheduling a hearing on May 19 with Regina Wallace-Jones, the CEO of the massive Democratic fundraising platform, ActBlue.
